title: Procurement Clerks
description: Compile information and records to draw up purchase orders for procurement of materials and services.

tasks.text: Track the status of requisitions, contracts, and orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare purchase orders and send copies to suppliers and to departments originating requests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate costs of orders, and charge or forward invoices to appropriate accounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compare prices, specifications, and delivery dates to determine the best bid among potential suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of all organizational and governmental rules affecting purchases, and provide information about these rules to organization staff members and to vendors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine if inventory quantities are sufficient for needs, ordering more materials when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check shipments when they arrive to ensure that orders have been filled correctly and that goods meet specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact suppliers to schedule or expedite deliveries and to resolve shortages, missed or late deliveries, and other problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, and review purchasing files, reports and price lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review requisition orders to verify accuracy, terminology, and specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Respond to customer and supplier inquiries about order status, changes, or cancellations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor in-house inventory movement and complete inventory transfer forms for bookkeeping purposes.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compare suppliers' bills with bids and purchase orders to verify accuracy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate suppliers, using sources such as catalogs and the internet, and interview them to gather information about products to be ordered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor contractor performance, recommending contract modifications when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare invitation-of-bid forms, and mail forms to supplier firms or distribute forms for public posting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train and supervise subordinates and other staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
